rawAssistant: You're sharp to notice signs of trouble on this road, especially after last night's rain. Mud's still got a hold of it, and I've seen worse yet. This place can be treacherous in the mist – easy to get lost or caught off guard by something lurking just beneath the surface. You might want to keep an eye out for any other signs of...unsettling activity.
